---
title: "Round-trip Test"
---

## Content that must survive round-trip

::: {.editable}
LaTeX inline: $\frac{a}{b}$ and $\alpha + \beta$

Shortcode: {{< meta title >}}

Windows path: C:\Users\bob\file.txt

Explicit spaces:\ \ \

Code: `"\\d+"` and `\n`

Backslash-b: \b should not be backspace
:::
